This file includes all links and information to reproduce the results of the assessment
The following files are already available in the github repository:

data/3dbag_tiles/
    9-316-520.gpkg 

data/blique_images/
    camera_parameters.txt
    image_footprints.geojson

data/underpass_polygons/
    underpass_edges.geojson
    underpasses.geojson

data/ground_truth/
    underpasses_rotterdam3d.geojson
    underpasses_rotterdam3d_revised.geojson

output/
    visualizations_GT_unet/
    underpass_heights_ccmethod.geojson
    underpass_heights_depthmethod.geojson
    underpass_heights_unetmethod.geojson
    assessment_ccmethod.geojson
    assessment_depthmethod.geojson
    assessment_unetmethod.geojson


The following files must be downloaded and added to the data folders:

3dbag_tiles\
9-308-520.gpkg - https://data.3dbag.nl/v20250903/tiles/9/308/520/9-308-520.gpkg
9-308-524.gpkg - https://data.3dbag.nl/v20250903/tiles/9/308/524/9-308-524.gpkg
9-312-520.gpkg - https://data.3dbag.nl/v20250903/tiles/9/312/520/9-312-520.gpkg
9-312-524.gpkg - https://data.3dbag.nl/v20250903/tiles/9/312/524/9-312-524.gpkg
9-316-520.gpkg - https://data.3dbag.nl/v20250903/tiles/9/316/520/9-316-520.gpkg
9-316-524.gpkg - https://data.3dbag.nl/v20250903/tiles/9/316/524/9-316-524.gpkg
9-320-516.gpkg - https://data.3dbag.nl/v20250903/tiles/9/320/516/9-320-516.gpkg
9-320-520.gpkg - https://data.3dbag.nl/v20250903/tiles/9/320/520/9-320-520.gpkg

oblique_images\
download link - https://georizon.nl/downloads/019cf738-a8ba-711b-8ebd-f9b342ad01dd?signature=c89a06101d18d570792f58a9260f0015f07e4e9ffb5830a141244f2378996bf1
The set of used images for the test is given below:
